title: Umbrella: Rewrite Lesson Classifier baseado nos PDFs RegLife
plan: US-053a: Foundation — Add postflop guards (block all-in preflop hands from postflop lessons), change _eval methods to return (Optional[int], str) tuples with PT-BR notes, add 'insufficient_data' mastery status, remove Lessons 10 & 11 from classifier, update templates for new mastery badge

US-053b: Rewrite Preflop Lessons 1-4 — Read PDFs for RFI, Flat/3Bet, Reação vs 3Bet, Open Shove; extract exact ranges by position/stack; rewrite _eval_rfi, _eval_flat_3bet, _eval_vs3bet, _eval_open_shove with PDF-accurate criteria and PT-BR notes

US-053c: Rewrite Preflop Lessons 5-9 — Read PDFs for Squeeze, BB Defense, Blind War SB vs BB, Multiway BB, BB vs SB; extract ranges and criteria; rewrite _eval_squeeze, _eval_bb_defense, _eval_blind_war_sb, _eval_multiway_bb, _eval_blind_war_bb with notes

US-053d: Rewrite Postflop Lessons 13-17 — Read PDFs for CBet Flop IP/OOP, CBet Turn, CBet River, Delayed CBet; extract board texture rules, sizing guidelines, frequencies; rewrite all cbet eval methods with guards and notes

US-053e: Rewrite Postflop Lessons 18-22 — Read PDFs for BB vs CBet, Check-Raise, IP vs CBet, Bet vs Missed, Probe; extract defense frequencies, ranges; rewrite eval methods with postflop guards and notes
US-053f: Rewrite Advanced Lessons 12, 23-25 — Read PDFs for Pós-Flop Avançado, 3Bet Pots Postflop, Bounty Intro, Bounty Ranges; implement or mark NOT_CLASSIFIABLE; add notes
Validation: Run classifier against eu.db (40 hands), verify unknown rate < 15% per lesson, verify 100% notes coverage, sanity-check results
